name: AIM
description: had an auto aim feature using linear regresion and April tags, was intresting because most sucsessful robots that year had a hooded launcher not a parellel launcher

stack.title: Vision
stack.body: Did not use limelight instead used a webcam and onboard computations

stack.title: Pathing
stack.body: used pedropathing and GoBuilda pinpoint module

stack.title: Intake
stack.body: A boot wheel based intake, same motor powered the feeder mechanism

stack.title: Launcher
stack.body: Used parellel launcher which is two wheels rotating oposite of each other that the ball is pushed through

timeline.title: The Screamage
timeline.detail: we had the robot that would become our final version

timeline.title: South Bay Meet #1
timeline.detail: Wheel belt broke before first match had to borrow a belt from a diffrent team

timeline.title: South Bay Meet #3
timeline.detail: Increased placment up by one spot

timeline.title: South Bay League Tornament
timeline.detail: at the end of quals we were third and at the end of tornament we were still third

telemetry.label: Cool feature want to use it just don't know what for

notes: This robot gave us our best year yet
